# RFC 0001 hyphence test vectors.
#
# Each non-comment line: name\tinput-b64\toutcome\texpected-b64
#
# Outcomes are namespaced by the owning harness so multiple test
# harnesses can share this single canonical vector file. An unknown
# outcome inside a harness's own namespace is a typo and fatals;
# outcomes in another harness's namespace are skipped.
#
# Outcomes:
#   legacy/parse-ok                            - DecodeFrom must succeed; blob bytes
#                                                (captured via BlobTeeWriter) must
#                                                equal the base64-decoded expected
#                                                field.
#   legacy/parse-error-missing-separator       - DecodeFrom must error with
#                                                errors.Is(err, errMissingNewline-
#                                                AfterBoundary).
#   document/parse-error-invalid-prefix        - MetadataValidator (via Reader) must
#                                                error with errors.Is(err,
#                                                ErrInvalidPrefix).
#   document/parse-error-malformed-line        - MetadataValidator (via Reader) must
#                                                error with errors.Is(err,
#                                                ErrMalformedMetadataLine).
#   document/parse-error-inline-body-with-at   - Reader must succeed; the post-
#                                                ReadFrom validator state must show
#                                                an @-line was seen AND a body section
#                                                followed (the validate subcommand
#                                                surfaces ErrInlineBodyWithAtReference
#                                                from this state).
#
# Comment lines start with #. Blank lines are ignored.
#
# Plain-text view of each input:
#   minimal-no-body          : "---\n! toml-type-v1\n---\n"
#   body-with-separator      : "---\n! md\n---\n\nhello\n" -> blob "hello\n"
#   body-without-separator   : "---\n! toml-type-v1\n---\nfile-extension = 'png'\n"
#                              (no blank line after closing ---; strict default rejects)

minimal-no-body	LS0tCiEgdG9tbC10eXBlLXYxCi0tLQo=	legacy/parse-ok	
body-with-separator	LS0tCiEgbWQKLS0tCgpoZWxsbwo=	legacy/parse-ok	aGVsbG8K
body-without-separator	LS0tCiEgdG9tbC10eXBlLXYxCi0tLQpmaWxlLWV4dGVuc2lvbiA9ICdwbmcnCg==	legacy/parse-error-missing-separator	-

# New vectors for the format-only document model (Task 1.6).
# Scanned by TestDocumentRFCConformance in document_test.go.

invalid-prefix-X	LS0tCiEgbWQKWCBiYWQKLS0tCgo=	document/parse-error-invalid-prefix	-
malformed-no-space	LS0tCiFub3NwYWNlCi0tLQoK	document/parse-error-malformed-line	-
inline-body-with-at-ref	LS0tCkAgYmxha2UyYjI1Ni1hYmMKISBtZAotLS0KCmlubGluZQo=	document/parse-error-inline-body-with-at	-
